name: radpro-tld-monitoring
description: Deployable Windows-friendly TLD personal monitoring portal using Node 22 built-in SQLite, with radiation safety training questionnaire preview for RSO/admin, training score PDFs, acknowledgement PDF reports, mandatory quarterly TLD awareness poster acceptance, Radpro licensing/trial/billing control, targeted notifications, RSC records, e-sign, overexposure case register, encrypted backups and audit pack export.
